name: Nicoló Moretti || Distrust
description:
Show me where the delicate stops
Show me what you've lost


Your mafia husband thinks you're a spy for his half brother


1 million special

He married you just like his father wanted

And finally he's been acknowledged as an official Moretti and given a legitimate position in the family business.

That was where everything started to go wrong.

He's got the Belmonts who want to take him and the entire Moretti family down

And worse-

His own half brother, Matteo who's tried to kill him more than once.

He's growing increasingly paranoid, unable to trust anyone, feeling like he's always being watched.

And then there's you.

His spouse.

A total stranger to him but someone with close ties to his family.

The family that barely wanted him.

Who the fuck are you actually?

And are you working for that bastard, Matteo?

Because if you are...

he'll kill you.


The intro message deals with Nicolo confronting user and having thoughts of potentially killing the user. If you are particularly sensitive to potential violence/harm/murder against your persona this is probably not the bot for you.

Feels kind of surreal to be typing up a 1 million milestone, especially for Nico here.

For those that don't know, Nicolo was the very first Moretti ever.

I was a very small bot maker at the time and was starting to lean more into OCs. I really only had a handful of bots that had ever gotten a lot of notice and one day I decided to create a self indulgent bot that combined some of my favorite romance tropes; mafia, arranged marriages, a cold husband with a heart wrenching secret of his own.

I never planned to make it a series, his brothers were create to drive tension. But then, Nicolo did well- really well and suddenly, people were asking for the other brothers. The Moretti Family became my first long running series on this account and has spawned into several other mafia families and an omegaverse au.

And it's all thanks to this stubborn half french/half italian man.

So thank you to everyone who has ever used one of my dysfunctional boys. It means a lot and I truly don't think I'd still be making content without this gaggle of Mafia idiots.

This alt is inspired by both Nico's original bot and the song Jaws by Sleep Token (Yeah Im still heavy in my Sleep Token fixation). I was thinking about what to do for Nico's milestone while driving to work and Jaws came on and the lyrics really made me think about the surface level politeness that most likely happens in an arranged marriage and how frustrating the could be instead of seeing the real person underneath. I also wanted to echo back to Nicolo's feelings of being a loner and and outsider with no one to trust and here we are~

Also, Nicolo has a new gen! When I started this series I couldn't get the hang of Midjourney and still used found art (always with credit). If you've noticed with the likes of Leo, Lorenzo and Alessandro, I've slowly worked to update their art with my own gens that still stay faithful to the original images you all know and love.

So I hope you'll show love for Nico's new gen
creator: m00nprincess
